scripts.build:release: tauri build && powershell -Command "$src = 'src-tauri\\target\\release\\bundle\\nsis'; $f = (Get-ChildItem $src -Filter '*-setup.exe' | Select-Object -First 1).FullName; if ($f) { $out = '..\\releases'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; Copy-Item $f -Destination "$out\\POS-Enterprise-Setup.exe" -Force; Write-Host ('Ready: ' + $out + '\\POS-Enterprise-Setup.exe') } else { Write-Host 'ERROR: installer not found' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }"
